edges.purpose: delegate topology reading and audit tasks for any target swarm
delegate test event firing and run outcome monitoring
delegate approved topology and constitution modifications — only after human approval
report audit findings and topology state back to the orchestrator
report test run status and errors back to the orchestrator
report modification results and any errors back to the orchestrator

skills.purpose: read the full topology of any target swarm
survey all workspaces and swarms on the platform
get agent UUIDs for a swarm
read the source code of a skill to diagnose failures and inform fix proposals
fire a test event payload into a target swarm
check run status and outcomes for a target swarm
apply a topology operation to a target swarm after human approval
update agent constitutions in batch after human approval
update a skill's Python and YAML source code after human approval

calls.purpose: request human approval before any modification is applied to a live swarm
